name: UBA : User Attempt to Use a Suspended Account
notes: Detects when a user tries to access the organization resources by using suspended or blocked privileges
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:UBA : Common Log Source Filters
when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log

when the event QID is one of the following (5000492) Failure Audit: A handle to an object was requested, (5000487) Failure Audit: A handle to an object was requested, (5000503) Failure Audit: A privileged service was called
TD_list: APPLY UBA : User Attempt to Use a Suspended Account on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:UBA : Common Log Source Filters
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log

AND when the event QID is one of the following (5000492) Failure Audit: A handle to an object was requested, (5000487) Failure Audit: A handle to an object was requested, (5000503) Failure Audit: A privileged service was called
RED_list: Event name: UBA : User Attempt to Use a Suspended Account
